title: Assistant Director of Nursing (Operating Theatre)
description:
IHH Healthcare Singapore (IHH SG) is the largest private healthcare provider in Singapore and one of the region's most trusted and well known healthcare brands.

At IHH, we strive to exceed patients' expectations by anticipating their needs - now and into the future. We never rest in our constant pursuit of clinical, operational and service excellence.


Our People are our Priority

We offer comprehensive and competitive benefits that are meaningful and accessible, so as to meet individual aspirations and personal preferences.

Besides creating a supportive working environment, the benefits are designed to care for your physical health and general well-being, complement your financial aspirations, and support your personal and professional growth.

In doing so, we believe that the positive experience in your wellness will keep you happy, healthy and passionate as you engage in work that you enjoy doing every day.


The Role:

Provide Nursing leadership, management and direction in regard to setting and maintaining quality standards, staff development and resource management in daily operation of the unit.

Reporting to the Director of Nursing, the responsibilities include but not limited to:

  • Set unit goals and objectives in consultation with clinical team.
  • Responsible for induction process, competency assessment, staff learning needs and plans for nurses’ career progression.
  • Evaluate the quality and appropriateness of nursing care and make appropriate changes in nursing care delivery.
  • Facilitate reviews on occurrence reports and ensure plans are implemented to prevent future occurrences.
  • Monitor budget and expenditure to ensure efficient and effective use of consumables.
  • Plan schedule to ensure efficient use of adequate skill mix in proportion to patient acuity and census.
  • Ensure that the system clinical policies and procedures are in line.
  • Engage in systems level thinking and its application to a variety of situations and contexts.
  • Provide leadership in the recruitment, selection, development and retention of nurses in partnership with the nursing team.


Requirements

  • Bachelor Degree in Nursing, with Advanced Diploma / Post Basic in Perioperative / Perianaesthesia Nursing
  • Must be a Registered Nurse with Singapore Nursing Board
  • At least 4 years of relevant experience in a similar job position and department

postedCompany.description:
Touching Lives, Transforming Care


We are IHH, one of the world’s largest healthcare networks, with 80 hospitals in 10 countries.


We believe that making a difference starts with empathy and putting our patients’ needs first to build lasting relationships based on trust.


From everyday care to the little acts that warm the heart, we always deliver our best with genuine compassion – one patient, one family, one touch at a time.


With our unique reach and scale, we strive to continuously raise the bar in healthcare across multiple geographies and create synergies throughout our network. We offer our patients a full spectrum of integrated healthcare services across our portfolio of trusted healthcare brands.


As we build on what we do well and share our strengths and resources globally, we are making healthcare better, faster, easier and more affordable for our patients.
postedCompany.name: PARKWAY HOSPITALS SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
